title: Lantern preferred art and visual style profile
content: Preferred visuals: Renaissance fresco-inspired mural, stormlit marble clouds, tesseract wireframes, spectrograph pixel bands, lantern ring, comet arc, wish door, masked/armored/draped tabletop fantasy silhouettes, Tony Garage/Arc Reactor status cockpit.
operator_boundary: No official/protected art copied; no raw sensitive data; no Canva dependency.

title: Custom report library contract
content: Reports must include executive summary, operator directive, promoted systems, evidence table, visual style board, DND/tabletop art profile, safety boundaries, graph, validation log, RAG handoff, and next actions.

title: Privacy, quantum, and revenue safety gate
content: Sanitize private activity logs; hold quantum immortality as philosophy/safety context only; reject Ponzi/pyramid/fake-return mechanics and use only delivered products/services/grants/disclosed referrals.
operator_boundary: Do not make health, survival, self-harm, investment, or guaranteed-income claims.
